summary: Iteration 145 - All 10 UI reorganization features tested and PASSED. Verified: Adviser Client Overview has 5 tabs (Overview, Actions, Retirement, Tax Centre, Investments), Investments tab has NO Rebalancing sub-tab, Tax Centre sub-tabs work correctly, Personal Dashboard has 5 tabs (Overview, Net Worth, Wealth Trends, Insights, Transactions) with NO Investments/Retirement tabs, Personal sidebar has Tax Centre under PLANNING (not TOOLS), TOOLS only has Loan Calculator, Adviser sidebar CRM has no Compare Clients, Dashboard label is 'Dashboard' (not Command Center), Adviser Dashboard page title is 'Adviser Dashboard' with no Market Intelligence/Knowledge Graph sections.

issues: ComplianceModal appears on first visit - requires dismissal before testing (expected behavior)

critical_code_review_comments: UnifiedClientOverview.jsx: Correctly has 5 tabs - Overview, Actions, Retirement, Tax Centre, Investments (renamed from Transactions)
PersonalDashboard.jsx: Correctly has 5 inner tabs - Overview, Net Worth, Wealth Trends, Insights, Transactions (removed Investments and Retirement)
UnifiedInvestments.jsx: TABS array correctly excludes 'rebalancing' - only has 10 tabs
navData.js personalNavGroups: PLANNING section correctly has Budget, Goals & Scenarios, Retirement, Tax Centre
navData.js personalNavGroups: TOOLS section correctly has only Loan Calculator (Tax Centre moved to PLANNING)
navData.js adviserBaseNav: CRM section correctly has only Client Hub and Health Dashboard (no Compare Clients)
navData.js adviserBaseNav: Dashboard section correctly shows 'Dashboard' label (not 'Command Center')
AdvisorCommandCenter.jsx: Title correctly says 'Adviser Dashboard', no Market Intelligence/AI Knowledge Graph/Knowledge Graph Visualization sections
context_for_next_testing_agent: All UI reorganization changes verified. Key changes: 1) Adviser Client Overview top tabs renamed Transactions to Investments, 2) Investments sub-tabs no longer include Rebalancing, 3) Personal Dashboard tabs reordered and reduced to 5 (removed Investments/Retirement), 4) Tax Centre moved from TOOLS to PLANNING in personal sidebar, 5) Compare Clients removed from adviser CRM, 6) Adviser Dashboard renamed from Command Center, 7) Market Intelligence/Knowledge Graph sections removed from Adviser Dashboard.

adviser_client_overview_5_tabs.details: 5 top-level tabs exist: Overview (client-tab-overview), Actions (client-tab-actions), Retirement (client-tab-retirement), Tax Centre (client-tab-tax), Investments (client-tab-investments). No 'Transactions' tab at top level.

investments_tab_no_rebalancing.details: Investments tab renders UnifiedInvestments with 10 sub-tabs: Overview, Bonds, Cash & TDs, Crypto, Managed Funds, Property, Shares & ETFs, SMSF, Super & Pension, Unlisted. NO Rebalancing tab.

tax_centre_inner_tabs.details: Tax Centre tab shows 8 sub-tabs: Tax Analysis, BAS Calculator, Capital Gains, Division 7A, Tax Loss Harvesting, Income Splitting, Tax Calendar, Trust Distributions. Custom button-based tabs work correctly.

personal_dashboard_5_tabs_order.details: Personal Dashboard has exactly 5 inner tabs in order: Overview (tab-overview), Net Worth (tab-net-worth), Wealth Trends (tab-wealth-trends), Insights (tab-insights), Transactions (tab-transactions).

personal_dashboard_no_investments_retire.details: No 'Investments' tab (tab-investments) and no 'Retirement' tab (tab-retirement) exist in Personal Dashboard.

personal_sidebar_tax_centre_under_planni.details: PLANNING section contains: Budget, Goals & Scenarios, Retirement, Tax Centre. Tax Centre is correctly under PLANNING, not TOOLS.

personal_sidebar_tools_only_loan_calcula.details: TOOLS section contains only Loan Calculator. Tax Centre is NOT in TOOLS section.

adviser_sidebar_crm_no_compare_clients.details: CRM section contains only Client Hub and Health Dashboard. No 'Compare Clients' link found.

adviser_sidebar_dashboard_label.details: Dashboard section shows 'Dashboard' label for /advisor-command-center route, not 'Command Center'.

adviser_dashboard_page_title_no_market_i.details: Adviser Dashboard page title is 'Adviser Dashboard'. No Market Intelligence, AI Knowledge Graph, or Knowledge Graph Visualization sections exist.
